✒ Author's Note ✒

Whenever I read that BSD Wan chapter where Atsushi gives Dazai flowers, I find myself wishing there was some way I could shower Dazai with all of the affection he feels he doesn't deserve. (I'm a bit delusional yeah yeah). Also requests will be next. This diea was holding me in a chokehold and I had to get it out.

July 25th, 2025: Updated the character bio and opened proxy.
